message:
feat(ui): add 'y' shortcut to copy bead ID in list view

Fixes #71 - The 'y' shortcut now works consistently in both list view
and board view. In list view, pressing 'y' copies the selected bead's
ID to the clipboard and displays a confirmation message.

Implementation mirrors the existing board view behavior (bv-yg39).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
